title: AMS-CeNN: Robust, Stability-Certified Multi-Scale Cellular Neural Networks for Long-Horizon Time Series Forecasting
description: Reference implementation and experiment harness for AMS-CeNN, a parameter-auditable, stability-certified multi-scale Cellular Neural Network for long-horizon multivariate time-series forecasting. Integrated into a pinned fork of NeuralForecast (v3.1.9); includes the model, the benchmark runner, and the analysis/figure scripts that reproduce the paper's tables and figures. Associated paper under review at IEEE Access (2026).
